name: tZERO Group, Inc.
summary: t0.com, Inc., doing business as t√É¬ò.com, develops a distributed ledger platform for capital markets. Its platform integrates cryptographically secure distributed ledgers with existing market processes to reduce settlement time and costs. t0.com, Inc. has a joint venture with BOX Digital Markets LLC for the trading of security tokens in the United States. t0.com, Inc. was formerly known as Medici Inc. and changed its name to t0.com, Inc. in April 2018. The company is based in Salt Lake City, Utah.
